removal_scope_definition: User clears invoice line → ingredient linkage so line presents as unmatched and stops contributing to that ingredient's cost chain

downstream_systems.current_behavior: Append-only rows keyed by ingredient_id + invoice_id; written on extract sync and manual confirm
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: B — requires historical cleanup for already-synced lines
downstream_systems.evidence: Pepino Bidfood row a689bd91 persists after matcher rejection; no delete API in ingredient-price-history.ts
downstream_systems.orphan_risk: Ghost/stale rows if match removed but history remains (14/20 VL rows already ghost per historical-pricing audit)

downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: B — may need recalc from remaining trusted history rows
downstream_systems.evidence: Pepino conserva current_price poisoned by fresh Pepino €0.00177/g operational price

downstream_systems.current_behavior: buildMatchedInvoiceProductsFromScan — live matcher over invoice_items; skips unmatched bucket
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: A — stops future inclusion once matcher returns null
downstream_systems.caveat: Rejected pair memory must block re-match; session rejectedMatchItemIds alone insufficient across devices

downstream_systems.current_behavior: Compares purchase memory across suppliers for same ingredient_id
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: A for future; B for historical comparisons already stored in price_history
downstream_systems.pepino_evidence: Bidfood fresh vs Aviludo jar compared under same ingredient_id — unit_family_mismatch

downstream_systems.current_behavior: Reads price_history + live matcher; P0 guard blocks alerts on incompatible chains
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: A for future OI reads if line unmatched; B raw DB still poisoned until history cleanup
downstream_systems.evidence: identity-contamination-audit: opportunities BLOCKED post-P0 on OI read path; raw DB still poisoned

downstream_systems.current_behavior: Uses ingredients.current_price; dispatchOperationalIngredientCostChanged on match events
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: B if current_price was set from removed line — needs price revert
downstream_systems.note: Recipes unaffected structurally — no FK from invoice_items to recipes

downstream_systems.current_behavior: alerts.tsx loads priceHistory array; margin calculations use ingredient prices
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: B for stale history rows; A once current_price corrected
downstream_systems.schema_fk: ingredient_price_history.invoice_id ON DELETE SET NULL — deleting invoice does not delete history

downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: A — line drops from ingredient match counts when unmatched

downstream_systems.current_behavior: Persists wording → ingredient; no delete helper in codebase
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: Conditional B — delete alias only if line was linked via alias
downstream_systems.pepino_note: Bidfood 'Pepino' has NO alias row — matched via kind:exact token overlap; reject pair sufficient

downstream_systems.current_behavior: autoPersistUnmatchedInvoiceItems on invoice expand — creates new ingredients for eligible unmatched lines
downstream_systems.remove_match_effect: A — unmatched line may become auto-persist candidate (watch for re-creation)

overall_verdict.rationale: Virtual match removal stops live matcher inclusion (A) but extract/manual sync already wrote ingredient_price_history and ingredients.current_price (B). Pepino proves poison persists without alias delete.

pepino_contamination_artifacts.guard_break: unit_family_mismatch between fresh weight and preserved jar lines
